ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train, car) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., gas, electric, hybrid) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that took the trip */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date the trip was taken */,
  "trip_time" TEXT /* Time the trip was taken */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the trip */,
  "destination_location" TEXT /* Destination location of the trip */,
  "trip_cost" REAL /* Cost of the trip (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in miles or kilometers */,
  "estimated_travel_time" INTEGER /* Estimated travel time for the route in minutes */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_details" (
  "trip_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip detail */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "number_of_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the trip */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles */,
  "trip_fare" REAL /* Fare collected for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, mobile payment) */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time the passengers were picked up */,
  "dropoff_time" TEXT /* Time the passengers were dropped off */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_details_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_areas" (
  "coverage_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage area */,
  "transportation_mode" TEXT /* Type of transportation mode (e.g., bus, train, car) */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area covered */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the area covered by the transportation mode */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the area in square miles or kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "number_of_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops within the area */,
  "average_wait_time" INTEGER /* Average wait time for transportation in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_areas_transportation_mode FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_mode") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_sharing_services" (
  "ride_sharing_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride-sharing service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the ride-sharing service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of ride-sharing service (e.g., Uber, Lyft) */,
  "service_url" TEXT /* URL of the ride-sharing service */,
  "service_phone" TEXT /* Customer service phone number */,
  "service_email" TEXT /* Customer service email address */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_sharing_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_sharing_trips" (
  "ride_sharing_trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride-sharing trip */,
  "ride_sharing_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride-sharing service */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location for the ride-sharing trip */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location for the ride-sharing trip */,
  "ride_cost" REAL /* Cost of the ride-sharing trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_sharing_trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_sharing_trips_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_sharing_trips_ride_sharing_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_sharing_service_id") REFERENCES ride_sharing_services ("ride_sharing_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, transportation analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Brief description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequential_coverage" (
  "sequential_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequential coverage */,
  "transportation_mode" TEXT /* Type of transportation mode */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of sequential coverage */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area covered sequentially */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sequential coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sequential coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequential_coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_coverage" (
  "individual_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual coverage */,
  "transportation_mode" TEXT /* Type of transportation mode */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individual coverage */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area covered individually */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the individual coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the individual coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_share_coverage" (
  "ride_share_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride-share coverage */,
  "transportation_mode" TEXT /* Type of transportation mode */,
  "coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ride-share coverage */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area covered by ride-sharing services */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ride-share coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ride-share coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_share_coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_usage" (
  "vehicle_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle usage */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips taken by the vehicle */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  "last_trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trip taken by the vehicle */,
  "last_trip_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trip taken by the vehicle */,
  "average_distance_per_trip" REAL /* Average distance traveled per trip */,
  "total_fuel_consumed" REAL /* Total fuel consumed by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_usage_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
